name: libldap2
title: libldap2
summary:
OpenLDAP libraries
These are the run-time libraries for the OpenLDAP (Lightweight Directory
Access Protocol) servers and clients.
description:

use_cases:
When you need Kali Linux, use libldap2 because OpenLDAP libraries
These are the run-time libraries for the OpenLDAP (Lightweight Directory
Access Protocol) servers and clients.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libldap2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libldap2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libldap2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
